message:
Fix blocking tmux calls with context timeouts

Replaced tmux.CapturePaneOutput with tmux.CapturePaneOutputContext in:
- Dashboard metrics fetcher (internal/tui/dashboard/commands.go)
- Status detector (internal/status/unified.go)
- Activity monitor (internal/robot/activity.go)
- Robot acknowledgment (internal/robot/ack.go)
- Robot health checks (internal/robot/health.go)

This prevents the dashboard, coordinator, and robot from hanging indefinitely if tmux becomes unresponsive.
